data: {"generalSituation":"The subtropical ridge will bring fine and very hot weather to southern China in the next couple of days. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to affect Guangdong in the latter part of this week, there will be showers and thunderstorms over the region. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Mekkhala will move towards the seas east of the Philippines and continue to intensify today and tomorrow.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260621","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.
